channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: The Rams get 4 field goals to beat the 49ers 12-6 in a sloppy game
item.description: Joshua Karty kicked four field goals and the Los Angeles Rams survived a slugfest a week after winning a shootout, beating the San Francisco 49ers 12-6 in a key game in the NFC West race.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Travis Hunter, the 2-way standout for Colorado, is the AP college football player of the year
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Travis Hunter is a throwback-type player — an elite receiver one moment, a lockdown cornerback the next — who rarely leaves the field and has a knack for making big plays all over it.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Celebrini puts on a show as Sharks beat Blues, end losing skid
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks finish road trip, now begin three-game homestand Saturday against the Utah Hockey Club
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: UNLV hires former Florida and Mississippi State head coach Dan Mullen as its new football coach
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — UNLV is reaching into the Southeastern Conference to keep momentum going for its 24th-ranked football team, hiring former Florida and Mississippi State coach Dan Mullen on Thursday. He will be introduced in a news conference Friday morning.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jones, Jefferson help No. 3 Iowa State rally past Iowa, 89-80
item.description: IOWA CITY, Iowa (AP) — Curtis Jones scored 23 points, Joshua Jefferson added 19 points and 10 rebounds and No. 3 Iowa State overcame a 13-point deficit to beat Iowa 89-80 on Thursday night. Iowa State (8-1) snapped a four-game road losing streak in the series.
item.dc:creator: JOHN BOHNENKAMP, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US Olympic and Paralympic officials put coach on leave after AP reports sexual abuse allegations
item.description: The U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Committee placed an employee on administrative leave Thursday after The Associated Press reported that one of its coaches was accused of sexually abusing a young biathlete, causing her so much distress that she attempted suicide.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Texas Rangers and RHP Nathan Eovaldi finalize $75 million, 3-year contract
item.description: Nathan Eovaldi and the Texas Rangers have finalized a $75 million, three-year contract that keeps him in their starting rotation.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Hawkins, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: To lure Juan Soto, Mets created a video of his statue outside Citi Field next to Tom Seaver's
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The New York Mets wanted Juan Soto to know his future with them could be set in stone.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bill Belichick 'always wanted' to give college coaching a try. Now he will at North Carolina
item.description: Bill Belichick had just been introduced Thursday as North Carolina's next football coach when chancellor Lee Roberts came armed with a gift: a short-sleeved gray hoodie — a bit of a trademark from Belichick's NFL coaching days — bearing a blue interlocking “NC” logo.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Girls Basketball: Point Loma 36, Mar Vista 22
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls hoops in Point Loma with the Pointers hosting Mar Vista. Pointers win this one 36-22.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: SJ Earthquakes welcome 3 new players in deadline trade
item.description: (KRON) – Three players have been traded to the San Jose Earthquakes, the team announced Monday. Defender Dave Romney and midfielders Ian Harkes and Mark-Anthony Kaye will be making their way to Silicon Valley from the New England Revolution.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: How to watch 'Monday Night Football' in 'The Simpsons' universe
item.description: The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tua Tagovailoa's TD pass to Jonnu Smith gives Dolphins 32-26 overtime win over Aaron Rodgers, Jets
item.description: Tagovailoa sealed it with a 10-yard touchdown pass to Jonnu Smith in overtime to help the Dolphins spoil Rodgers' first 300-yard passing game in nearly three years and beat the Jets for the ninth straight time in Miami.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Indiana plays Chicago on 8-game road slide
item.description: Indiana Pacers (9-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-13, eighth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Friday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Pacers -3; over/under is 247 BOTTOM LINE: Indiana travels to Chicago looking to break its eight-game road losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
